mapper.select:
SELECT id, original_name AS originalName, content_type AS contentType, size_bytes AS sizeBytes, storage_type AS storageType, oss_provider AS ossProvider, object_key AS objectKey, biz_type AS bizType, md5, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM sys_file
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
